mnemonics.title: CUDA Trapezoidal Steps
mnemonics.content: KLRCT - Kernel Launch, compute Local f(x), Reduce in shared mem, Combine block sums, Transfer result to host

mnemonics.title: Trapezoidal Rule Formula
mnemonics.content: BANANA Split: (B-A)/N times Average of first+last plus sum of Middles

mnemonics.title: Thread Index Formula
mnemonics.content: TiB: Thread index = threadIdx + blockIdx * blockDim (like finding your seat in a theater: row*seats_per_row + seat)

mnemonics.title: Reduction Tree Steps
mnemonics.content: LOG-HALF: Parallel reduction takes LOG2(n) steps because we HALF the active threads each step

mnemonics.title: Error Order
mnemonics.content: H-SQUARED: Trapezoidal error is O(h^2). Double n means half h means quarter error (2^2 = 4x better)
